svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"> <diagram name="第 1 页" id="LHLuy37A4WE9kwZUOyQm"> <mxGraphModel dx="1460" dy="806" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" mermaidData="{
 "data": "flowchart TD
 A[\"用户输入层<br>语音|文本|Web界面|AI助手\"] --> B[\"自然语言解析模块<br>意图识别 + 参数提取\"]
 B --> C[\"MCP服务调度模块<br>指令校验 + 路由分发\"]
 C --> D[\"HUTB MCP服务<br>车辆|无人机|天气|传感器\"]
 C --> E[\"Unreal MCP服务<br>Actor|蓝图|节点|UI\"]
 D --> F[\"HUTB/CARLA仿真平台\"]
 E --> G[\"Unreal编辑器内核\"]
 F & G --> H[\"仿真状态与数据采集模块\"]
 H --> I[\"日志与结果返回模块\"]
 I --> J[\"Web可视化交互界面\"]",
 "config": null
}" id="duDcHRcIUjiw-UAeMMfD-55"> <mxCell connectable="0" parent="1" style="group;transparentBounds=1;editIcon=1;lockedGroup=0;groupPadding=20;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> <UserObject label="用户输入层
